chooseLanguageDescription: You can change this later in Settings.
welcomeDescriptionWindows: Your all-in-one Windows system cleaner. LightClean removes junk files, fixes registry issues, manages startup programs, and keeps your PC running fast.
welcomeDescriptionOther: Your all-in-one system cleaner. LightClean removes junk files, manages startup programs, and keeps your computer running fast.
recommendedSetupDescription: We recommend these settings for the best experience. You can change them later in Settings.
runAtStartupDescriptionWindows: Launch LightClean when Windows starts so your PC stays clean automatically
runAtStartupDescriptionOther: Launch LightClean at startup so your computer stays clean automatically
minimizeToTrayDescription: Keep LightClean running quietly in the background
weeklyAutoCleanDescription: Scan and clean junk files every Monday at 9:00 AM
allSetDescription: LightClean will keep your PC running smoothly in the background.
firstScanScheduled: Your first automatic scan is scheduled for Monday at 9:00 AM.
